name: El Romero
description: An intimate project by Italians Fabio Tullini and Francesca Baroni in a historic building on Maó's plaça de la Conquesta, with just a few tables that spill onto the square in fine weather. Tasting menus from the sea and from the garden, a fully gluten-free menu and a sustainable conviction the house presents as pioneering: the first restaurant to carry the Menorca Biosphere Reserve brand, by its own account, and a member of the Slow Food Cooks' Alliance. One Repsol Guide Sol since the 2024 edition, and Michelin Guide recommended in 2026.

practicalInfo.acceso: Plaça de la Conquesta, Maó (old town).
practicalInfo.horario: Seasonal; confirm days and hours on the official website before going.
practicalInfo.servicios: Book via the official website (phone number listed there).

seo.description: El Romero (Maó): the sustainable table of Fabio Tullini and Francesca Baroni, with a Repsol Sol since 2024, a gluten-free menu and sea and garden tasting menus.
